form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 6 m by Seaside Party (1:56.20) in FMNW2500L4 on March 28 at $41.70. The run before 6th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 25 m by Joyful Lady (1:54.40) in FMNW2500L4 on March 21 at $30.40. Watch for a far better effort this time.
